reviews.comment:
No fui bien atendido y no es la primera vez que paso. Casualmente simpre que pido para usar el baño esta en eternas refacciones. No viene al caso pero siendo socio me molesto un poco. Ojala lo lean y lo tomen como critica constructiva y puedan mejorarlo.

(Translated by Google)
I wasn't treated well, and it's not the first time this has happened. Coincidentally, whenever I ask to use the bathroom, it's always under renovation. It's irrelevant, but as a member, it bothers me a little. I hope they read this and take it as constructive criticism so they can improve things.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURLdXVXWG1BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Te venden agua fría para el mate a un precio terrible, no se olviden de cargar agua antes de salir a la ruta! Cuido con el ingreso al lugar desde la ruta (la primer entrada de Bolson a Bariloche) podés dejar el tren delantero en esos baches

(Translated by Google)
They sell you cold water for your mate at a terrible price. Don't forget to fill up on water before hitting the road! Be careful when entering the area from the road (the first entrance from Bolson to Bariloche). You could leave the front end in those potholes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURLa3IzSHZRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cuando la visite no tenía combustible, pero le usamos el baño que nos saco del paso 😂. Tiene unos perritos re compinches jaja

(Translated by Google)
When I visited, she didn't have any gas, but we used her bathroom, which saved the day 😂. She has some really friendly dogs, haha.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLaDZ6ajlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención.
Pagos en efectivo y con tarjetas.
No se puede usar la aplicación de YPF.

(Translated by Google)
Good service.
Cash and card payments accepted.
The YPF app is not available.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Jorge. Ahora si se puede pagar con la app YPF.

reviews.comment:
El baño muy sucio y roto. Había una especie de fullypf pero estaba cerrada por lo que no pudimos comprar nada ni para comer ni para tomar. Algo abandonado

(Translated by Google)
The bathroom was very dirty and broken. There was a kind of convenience store, but it was closed, so we couldn't buy anything to eat or drink. It felt a bit run down.
